action.reasoning: Observation: iter_7 with mixup/cutmix got only 0.6950 val_acc vs iter_5's 0.7560. The best checkpoint is from iter_5 (0.7598 balanced_accuracy). Mixup/cutmix hurt performance. Analysis: Need to try CLIP ViT-B/16 which has much richer features. iter_4 showed CLIP trains at ~29s/epoch. With 1.4h remaining, I can train 60-80 epochs. Key: balanced sampling + label smoothing + no mixup + proper LR for ViT. Decision: Train CLIP ViT-B/16 for 80 epochs with balanced sampling, label smoothing, cosine LR with warmup. Save to checkpoints/best_clip.pt and submit eval if it beats current best.
